asr_es: Muchas gracias, señora comisaria. Se procederá a la votación de este informe mañana a partir de las once horas treinta minutos. Queda cerrado este debate y, de conformidad con el orden del día, procedemos al debate del informe del señor Cercas sobre la ordenación del tiempo de trabajo. En nombre de la Comisión de Empleo y Asuntos Sociales tiene la palabra el señor ponente. Señor Cercas.
hypothesis_en: I should also like to thank the rapporteur, Mr Cercas, for his report on the organization of working time in the Community, which has been adopted by the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, and the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, which has been adopted by the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, which has been adopted by the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, which has been adopted by the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, and the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, which has been adopted by the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection, which has been adopted by the Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Consumer Protection.
reference_en: thank you very much Commissioner the vote on this item will be taken tomorrow as of eleven thirty the debate is closed on that item now on the agenda we move to the debate on the report by Mr Cercas Organisation of Working Time for the Committee on Employment and Social Affairs you have the floor rapporteur
